---
title: "AnalysisMergedCleaned"
author: "Neda Safari"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
mortality_clean <- read.csv("../data/mortality_clean.csv")
NPVisitCleaned <- read.csv("../data/NPVisitCleaned.csv")
NPVisitbyYearCleaned<- read.csv("../data/NPVisitbyYearCleaned.csv")
MergedWithYear<- full_join(mortality_clean, NPVisitbyYearCleaned, by = c("park" = "Parkname"))
AnalysisMerged<- full_join(mortality_clean, NPVisitCleaned, by = c("park" = "Parkname"))

write.csv(MergedWithYear, "../data/MergedWithYear.csv")
MergedYear<- read.csv("../data/MergedWithYear.csv")

write.csv(AnalysisMerged, "../data/AnalysisMerged.csv")
MergedData<- read.csv("../data/AnalysisMerged.csv")
```
